Structural drawings were revised following drawing approval to incorporate additional details necessary for construction of the RF shielding room for the UCSF MCH W 3.0T MRI Replacement project. A new sheet, S51-03, was added to consolidate structural details for the RF shielding room that were previously issued as structural sketches in response to contractor issued RFIs. These details include RF shielding support, cable tray support, soffit framing, utility supports within the RF shielding enclosure, and a revised equipment anchorage detail for the chiller interface panel. In addition to the inclusion of S51-03, revisions were made to sheet S51-02. Detail 3 on S51-02 was removed from the drawing set because updated RF shielding support details were incorporated into S51-03. Detail 5 on S51-02 was also removed following the issuance, review, and approval of RFI 013, which directed the project to follow ETS Lindgren’s finish wall anchorage detailing. Furthermore, Details 1 and 2 on S51-02 were revised to reflect anchorage locations measured from the isocenter rather than the center of gravity, as the original configuration was not constructible.to B241425

REVISION TO S23254: REVISION #1: GROUND SCREWS REPLACING CONCRETE PIERS Revising the means by which the solar array racking system is anchored to the ground. The currently approved plan uses 3' x 1' concrete piers to support the eight upright 2" mechanical galvanized steel posts that hold up the Ironridge racking system. To decrease potential root damage of large trees in the area and to make the installation process more efficient, eight 3" x 51" ground screws will be used to anchor the upright 2" mechanical galvanized steel posts instead of concrete piers. REVISION #2: APTOS MAC-800 MICROINVERTERS REPLACING ENPHASE IQ8PLUS-72-2-US MICROINVERTERS Also during the solar equipment ordering process, it was brought to my attention that the Enphase IQ8PLUS-72-2-US [240v] [SI1-SB] Microinverters are not the best match for the Aptos Solar DNA -144-BF26-440 panels we are using. The Aptos Mac800 Dual Unit 2:1 Trunk Version Microinverter is much more compatible with our panels because it is made by same company, Aptos Solar Technologies. As a result, we are changing our plans to accommodate these Aptos Microinverters.
